report_metadata.step_description: Using the asset records extracted in Step 7 and the symbol matches identified in Step 8, produce a fully enriched asset register. For each asset record, merge the original TAL fields with the matched symbol data from Step 8: add symbol_description (visual drawing symbol description), label (legend label text such as NEW LANTERN, EXISTING POLE, REMOVE LANTERN), and match_status (found/not_found). Where Step 8 returned match_status 'not_found', fall back to matching by comparing asset_type and description text against the drawing legend entries from Step 6, and set match_confidence to reflect whether the match came from the drawing (high) or from text inference (medium/low/none). Output a consolidated enriched asset list with all original TAL fields preserved plus the enrichment columns.
report_metadata.validation_criteria: Must return a JSON object with 'enriched_assets' (array) and 'match_summary' (object). Every asset record from Step 7 must appear in 'enriched_assets'. Each entry must contain all original TAL fields plus: 'symbol_description' (string or null), 'label' (string or null), 'legend_label' (string or null), 'legend_category' (string or null), and 'match_confidence' (one of: high, medium, low, none). 'match_summary' must include 'total', 'found_on_drawing', 'inferred', and 'not_found' integer counts that sum to total. Assets whose symbol was identified from the drawing (via Step 8) must have match_confidence 'high'. A not_found count equal to total is acceptable when Step 8 found no drawing matches — do not fail solely on this basis.

files_read.description: Output file produced by the agent

files_output.description: Validation test report generated by step validator

execution_context.prompt:
## STEP NAME
Enrich Assets with Legend Data

## STEP DESCRIPTION
Using the asset records extracted in Step 7 and the symbol matches identified in Step 8, produce a fully enriched asset register. For each asset record, merge the original TAL fields with the matched symbol data from Step 8: add symbol_description (visual drawing symbol description), label (legend label text such as NEW LANTERN, EXISTING POLE, REMOVE LANTERN), and match_status (found/not_found). Where Step 8 returned match_status 'not_found', fall back to matching by comparing asset_type and description text against the drawing legend entries from Step 6, and set match_confidence to reflect whether the match came from the drawing (high) or from text inference (medium/low/none). Output a consolidated enriched asset list with all original TAL fields preserved plus the enrichment columns.

## INPUT DATA (metadata/context sent to agent)
{"asset_count": 18, "legend_count": 0, "drawing_matched": 0, "text_fallback": 18}

## VALIDATION CRITERIA
Must return a JSON object with 'enriched_assets' (array) and 'match_summary' (object). Every asset record from Step 7 must appear in 'enriched_assets'. Each entry must contain all original TAL fields plus: 'symbol_description' (string or null), 'label' (string or null), 'legend_label' (string or null), 'legend_category' (string or null), and 'match_confidence' (one of: high, medium, low, none). 'match_summary' must include 'total', 'found_on_drawing', 'inferred', and 'not_found' integer counts that sum to total. Assets whose symbol was identified from the drawing (via Step 8) must have match_confidence 'high'. A not_found count equal to total is acceptable when Step 8 found no drawing matches — do not fail solely on this basis.

## YOUR TASK
Generate and execute structured test cases against the agent's output. Use the FULL FILE CONTENTS (when provided) as your primary evidence. Cross-reference every item between input and output files. For each test case, document: the input data examined, the expected output, the actual output found, step-by-step execution notes of how you validated, and your final reasoning. Respond with the JSON test report.
